name: Ponlo Family Hub MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Ponlo — a family calendar, tasks, meals, lists, and rewards hub for AI assistants. Enables AI agents to manage family schedules, assign and track household tasks, plan meals, manage shopping lists, and run reward systems for family members.
use_cases: Managing family calendars and schedules from household organization agents
Assigning and tracking chores and tasks for family members from family management agents
Planning weekly meals and generating shopping lists from meal planning agents
Running family reward and chore tracking systems from parenting assistant agents
not_for: Single-user productivity without family coordination needs
High-volume calendar operations at organizational scale
best_when: A family wants an AI assistant to help coordinate household activities — managing schedules, task assignments, meal planning, and family rewards — through a unified family hub platform.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-scale calendar/task management. Ponlo is purpose-built for household and family coordination, not business operations.

auth.notes: Ponlo account required. Authentication details from Ponlo platform. Family data is private — ensure access control per family member.

pricing.notes: Pricing not documented. Emerging family hub service.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Family data includes children's information — heightened privacy sensitivity
Family member permissions: ensure agents can't expose one member's data to another
Emerging service with limited documentation and track record
Children's data may trigger COPPA compliance requirements in US
Reward system manipulation: validate agent can't grant unlimited rewards
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Family data including children's schedules and activities. COPPA compliance considerations for children's data. Family member access control critical.

security_score_components.security_notes: Family data including minors. COPPA applies for children's data. Private family information requires careful access control. SaaS data handling review needed.
